推荐场景: 服务柜台｜清楚说明问题
60秒任务: 「说明问题」：问题/方案/让步/决定；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 问题说明｜方案｜替代｜担心｜让步｜达成一致
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Something is wrong with ___.（说明问题对象）
The problem started when ___.（说明起点）
It doesn’t work the way it should.（描述异常）
I tried ___, but it didn’t help.（说明已尝试）
I think the main issue is ___.（判断问题）
Could you take a look at it?（请求查看）
It happens every time I ___.（说明规律）
I’m not sure if it’s a mistake or a delay.（表达不确定）
Because of this, I can’t ___.（说明影响）
Let me show you what happened.（提供证据）
Can you explain what went wrong?（请求解释）
Is there a quick fix?（询问快速解决）
We need to solve this before ___.（说明期限）
Thanks for checking.（感谢协助）
Now I understand the problem.（确认理解）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: problem, issue, mistake, delay, screen, order, account
Verbs: start, happen, try, work, help, show
Adjectives / Adverbs: wrong, quick, serious, unclear
Time / Place: when I open it, before noon, today, online
Chunks: something is wrong, main issue, take a look, quick fix, went wrong
